description: UCGIS 2026 workshop reference KG — Authoring skills for building AgentLoom agents

skills.name: Builder Skills Root
skills.description: Root of the builder-role skills tree.

skills.name: Propose KG Node
skills.description: Agent-callable; writes candidate node JSON + UPDATE_LOG to proposals/.

skills.name: Validate KG
skills.description: Run schema + integrity validators over all 6 active KGs.

skills.name: Wire Validator
skills.description: Scaffold a Tier-A validator script and link it into a behavior node.

skills.name: Emit Cline Format
skills.description: Compile canonical KG into Cline platform-native rules + settings.

skills.name: Emit Claude Code Format
skills.description: Compile canonical KG into Claude Code .claude/skills/ + AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md.

skills.name: Audit catalog UI against storytelling + JSON-LD rules
skills.description: User-facing audit tool that walks starter/*/index.html, runs both the visible-section check and the JSON-LD check, prints grouped violations with hints. Complements (does not replace) the two CI-facing Tier-A validators by giving developers actionable feedback in one command.
